---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for c-coroutine
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: Harsh7115
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?

A clear and concise description of the problem. For example: "I always run into X when trying to do Y..."

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. If you have a concrete API proposal, sketch it out:

```c
// proposed API sketch
```

## Alternatives considered

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you have considered, and why you prefer the proposed approach.

## Impact assessment

Please estimate the impact of this change:

- [ ] New API / public symbol (requires semver minor bump)
- [ ] Behaviour change to existing API (requires semver major bump)
- [ ] Internal / implementation change only (no API change)
- [ ] Documentation or tooling only

## Additional context

Add any other context, links to related issues or prior art, benchmarks, etc.
